metadata.description: Personal skills + plugin bundle for vibe research/coding, in two sets: report (decks, figures) and research (plan grilling). Install skills via `npx skills add zhuconv/viberesearch`.

plugins.name: report
plugins.description: Report set: authoring Slidev decks and rendering SVG diagrams to PNG for docs and presentations.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research set: grilling workflows that stress-test plans and designs, with optional docs/ADR updates.
